description: Perform data cleaning on the health survey dataset 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SurveyData\raw_health_survey.csv' using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. Identify records with logical inconsistencies: Gender Conflict (Respondent is 'Male' but IsPregnant is 'Yes') and Skip Pattern Conflict (EverSmoked is 'No' but CigsPerDay is greater than 0). Export these problematic records to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\SurveyData\validation_errors.csv', ensuring the output includes 'RespondentID' and an 'ErrorType' variable identifying the specific conflict ('GenderConflict' or 'SkipConflict').
